# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: linkerd-namespace-config
data:
  linkerd.io/inject: "true"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: services
spec:
  host: service.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL

---
apiVersion: policy.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: istio-policy
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: service
  rules:
    - from:
        source:
          notInUse: false
        namespaces:
          - default
      to:
        namespaces:
          - default

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: service-clusterip
spec:
  hosts:
    - service.default.svc.cluster.local
  addresses:
    - clusterIP-1234567890abcdef:80
  ports:
    - number: 80

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: service-headless
spec:
  hosts:
    - service.default.svc.cluster.local
  addresses:
    - headless-IP-1234567890abcdef:80
  ports:
    - number: 80

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: service-loadbalancer
spec:
  hosts:
    - service.default.svc.cluster.local
  addresses:
    - loadBalancer-IP-1234567890abcdef:80
  ports:
    - number: 80

---
apiVersion: policy.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: peer-authn
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: service
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: service
